import json
import re

# Read the notebook
with open\("C:\\\\Users\\\\Arkajyoti\\\\Downloads\\\\GoogleGNSSLogger_LogAnalysis\\\\Log4\\\\outputs\\\\gnss_quality_analysis_ref_Log4.ipynb", "r"\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

print\(f"Total cells: {len\(nb['cells']\)}\\n"\)

# Extract first 15 cells to see structure
for i in range\(min\(15, len\(nb['cells']\)\)\):
    cell = nb['cells'][i]
    print\(f"\\n=== CELL {i} \({cell['cell_type']}\) ==="\)
    source = ''.join\(cell['source']\) if isinstance\(cell['source'], list\) else cell['source']
    print\(source[:300]\)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Arkajyoti\\Downloads\\GoogleGNSSLogger_LogAnalysis\\Log_PDX-267_A17_Jio\\outputs" && python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Load the notebook
with open\('gnss_quality_analysis_ref_Log_PDX-267_A17_Jio.ipynb', 'r'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Extract device info from metadata
metadata = nb.get\('metadata', {}\)
print\("=== NOTEBOOK METADATA ==="\)
print\(json.dumps\(metadata, indent=2\)\)

# Find cells with outputs
print\("\\n=== CELLS WITH OUTPUTS ==="\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb.get\('cells', []\)\):
    if cell.get\('cell_type'\) == 'code':
        source = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)
        # Look for key functions
        if any\(x in source for x in ['print_results', 'Test Result', 'Measurement:', 'def print']\):
            print\(f"\\n--- CELL {i} ---"\)
            print\("SOURCE:"\)
            print\(source[:500]\)
            
            outputs = cell.get\('outputs', []\)
            if outputs:
                print\(f"\\nOUTPUTS \({len\(outputs\)}\):"\)
                for out in outputs[:3]:  # First 3 outputs
                    if out.get\('output_type'\) == 'stream':
                        print\(out.get\('text', ''\)[:1000]\)
                    elif out.get\('output_type'\) == 'execute_result':
                        print\(str\(out.get\('data', {}\)\)[:1000]\)

EOF)
